texto: Do I seriously have to go on this date? I mean seriously what if he's like the last one?"Jana complained to her best friend of Fifteen Years, as Destiny replied,"Girl, I have already settled down and had a child, you need to give this guy a chance heck who knows Gunther could be the one ever thought of that?"Jana rolled her eyes then looked herself in the mirror she has brunette short hair,grey eyes,five feet ten inches, one hundred eighty pounds and loves to be outgoing with her friends.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Annora Rose: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. O trecho “Do I seriously have to go on this date? I mean seriously what if he's like the last one?"Jana com…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que amizade, bestfriends, complaining pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de termino e complaining.

I mean seriously what if he's like the last one?"Jana complained to her best friend of Fifteen Years, as Destiny replied,"Girl, I have already settled down and had a child, you need to give this guy a chance heck who knows Gunther could be the one ever thought of that?"Jana rolled her eyes then looked herself in the mirror she has brunette short hair,grey eyes,five feet ten inches, one hundred eighty pounds and loves to be outgoing with her friends.
